intent: LLM KV cache template with explicit max-age TTL control
curl: curl -X POST "$GATEWAY_BASE/v1/chat/completions" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ALEPHANT_CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Alephant-Cache-Enabled: true" -H "Alephant-Cache-Control: max-age=30" -H "Alephant-Cache-Bucket-Max-Size: 2" -d '{"model":"openai/gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"cache-control-max-age-template"}],"max_tokens":8}'
